mapper.sql: id, customer_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province_id, province, city_id, city, district_id, district, detail_address, post_code, is_default, label, create_user_id, create_user_name, create_time, update_user_id, update_user_name, update_time, is_del
mapper.select: SELECT FROM customer_address WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
SELECT FROM customer_address WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND is_del = 0 ORDER BY is_default DESC, create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customer_address (id, customer_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province_id, province, city_id, city, district_id, district, detail_address, post_code, is_default, label, create_user_id, create_user_name, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{customerId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{provinceId}, #{province}, #{cityId}, #{city}, #{districtId}, #{district}, #{detailAddress}, #{postCode}, #{isDefault}, #{label}, #{createUserId}, #{createUserName}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
